user_query: I'm planning a trip to Europe with my friends and we need to exchange 100,000 Iraqi Dinars to Turkish Lira. Can you provide us with the exchange rate, including the buy and sell fees? Also, let us know the withdrawal fee in percentage. Furthermore, we would like to know the current price of the Euro and its asset information.

TaskList.description: Fetch the current exchange rate for Iraqi Dinars to Turkish Lira including buy and sell fees.
Retrieve information on the withdrawal fees in percentage for currency exchanges.
required_inputs: currency exchange service provider or bank name

TaskList.description: Get the current price of the Euro and its asset information.
